Package simulation

Interface UAVIntelligence

All Known Implementing Classes:
GaAcoIntelligence, PredefinedPatrolIntelligence
public interface UAVIntelligence
Strategy interface for a UAV's autonomous decision-making per tick.

An implementation is called once per drone tick, after the UAV has scanned its surroundings and moved one step. It may update a coverage tracker, steer the UAV toward unexplored regions, trigger replanning, or do nothing at all.

Built-in implementations

  • PredefinedPatrolIntelligence — no replanning; the UAV follows the fixed four-corner perimeter loop for the entire run. Serves as the A/B baseline.
  • GaAcoIntelligence — frontier-based coverage tracking, coverage-gated replanning, and the GA→ACO→LocalSearch path-planning pipeline.

Adding a new intelligence model

Implement this interface and pass an instance to SimulationRunner.run(java.util.List). No changes to UAV, the event loop, or any other class are required.

Threading

Each call to SimulationRunner.runOnce(long, int, simulation.UAVIntelligence, ui.VisualizationListener) creates a fresh UAVIntelligence instance; implementations are therefore never shared between threads and do not need to be thread-safe.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default CoverageGrid
    getCoverageGrid()
    Returns the coverage grid managed by this intelligence, or null if this intelligence does not track field coverage.
    String

    Human-readable label shown in run reports and the GUI sidebar.
    default int[]

    Computes the effective intercept point for a waypoint node during route execution (EXECUTE mode).

    onTick(long tick, UAV uav, Environment env)
    Invoked once per drone tick, after the UAV has scanned its surroundings and moved one step.

  • Method Details

    • onTick

      Route onTick(long tick, UAV uav, Environment env)
      Invoked once per drone tick, after the UAV has scanned its surroundings and moved one step.

      Implementations may:

      • Update a coverage tracker (CoverageGrid.markScanned(int, int, int)).
      • Set the UAV's frontier exploration target (UAV.setExplorationTarget(int, int)).
      • Trigger replanning (UAV.replan()) and return the resulting Route.
      • Do nothing and return null.
      Parameters:
      tick - simulation tick at which this event occurred
      uav - the drone entity; may call any public method
      env - the simulation environment (read-only for intelligence use)
      Returns:
      the new Route if replanning fired, null otherwise

    • getLabel

      String getLabel()
      Human-readable label shown in run reports and the GUI sidebar.
      Returns:
      display label, e.g. "Predefined Patrol" or "Autonomous GA→ACO"

    • getCoverageGrid

      default CoverageGrid getCoverageGrid()
      Returns the coverage grid managed by this intelligence, or null if this intelligence does not track field coverage.

      Used by SimulationRunner to include sector data in GUI snapshots and in the final coverage-fraction statistic.

      Returns:
      CoverageGrid instance, or null

    • interceptPoint

      default int[] interceptPoint(SensorNode target, int uavX, int uavY, int uavSpeed)
      Computes the effective intercept point for a waypoint node during route execution (EXECUTE mode).

      The default implementation returns the node's current position — the UAV simply moves toward where the node is now.

      Override to implement predictive interception of moving targets. See GaAcoIntelligence for a quadratic ballistic intercept example that leads moving nodes to minimise travel time.

      Parameters:
      target - the current waypoint node
      uavX - UAV's current x position
      uavY - UAV's current y position
      uavSpeed - UAV's speed in cells per tick
      Returns:
      [x, y] of the point to steer toward; clamping to field bounds is handled by the caller
